title: Hazaron Khwahishen
content: Hazaron khwahishen aisi ke har khwahish pe dam nikle

title: Main Bhi Bohat Ajeeb Hoon
content: Main bhi bohat ajeeb hoon itna ajeeb hoon ke bas

title: Shayad Mujhe Kisi Se Mohabbat Nahi Hui
content: Shayad mujhe kisi se mohabbat nahi hui

title: Bol
content: Bol ke lab azaad hain tere

title: Mujh Se Pehli Si Mohabbat
content: Mujh se pehli si mohabbat mere mehboob na maang

title: Ranjish Hi Sahi
content: Ranjish hi sahi dil hi dukhane ke liye aa

title: Khushbu
content: Khushbu ki tarah aaya woh tez hawaaon mein

title: Bulati Hai Magar
content: Bulati hai magar jaane ka nahi

title: Maa
content: Kisi ko ghar mila hisse mein ya koi dukaan aayi
